description.value:
Cost: 1 Effect: Make opposed [[/check skill=deception]] (Charisma + Deception vs target's Empathy + Wisdom)

  • Margin 0: no effect.
  • Margin 1: This action does not count towards the multiple action penalty. You subtract 1 from both dice on your next [combat] action.
  • Margin 2: This action does not count towards the multiple action penalty. You gain fortune on your next [combat] action.

system.effect: Make opposed Deception check (Charisma + Deception vs target's Empathy + Wisdom)
system.special:
Margin 0: no effect.
